news.summary: In San Diego, MANSCAPED®, a leading men's grooming and lifestyle brand, has announced a significant partnership with the Natural Selection Tour in 2025. The collaboration will see MANSCAPED supporting the Tour's Snow and Surf events, recognizing the importance of grooming for athletes in these extreme sports. The athletes participating in the Tour are top-tier professionals who value precision in their performance. MANSCAPED will be joining as the Official sponsor for the events, marking a new chapter in their sports marketing strategy.
news.headline: MANSCAPED® partners with Natural Selection Tour for Snow and Surf events in 2025, emphasizing precision grooming.

news.summary: In Hoboken, Culina Health revealed its partnership with the Adventist HealthCare Physician Alliance, which comprises over 2,400 healthcare providers. This alliance, a segment of the well-established Adventist HealthCare system featuring 50+ care facilities in the greater Washington, D.C. region, aims to enhance clinical nutrition care accessibility and inclusivity through Culina Health's digital platform.
news.headline: Culina Health partners with Adventist HealthCare to expand virtual nutrition counseling, reaching 2,400 healthcare providers in D.C. area.

news.summary: IVI RMA North America, a prominent fertility care and assisted reproduction provider based in Basking Ridge, New Jersey, disclosed plans for a special initiative to commemorate National Infertility Awareness Week (NIAW) from April 20 to 26, 2025. The initiative entails a series of free educational sessions focused on offering evidence-based insights on various fertility issues such as egg freezing, IVF, and related topics. These sessions will feature experts from IVI RMA North America’s extensive network, which includes Reproductive Medicine Associates.
news.headline: IVI RMA North America to offer free educational events during National Infertility Awareness Week on April 20-26,2025, covering various fertility topics.

news.summary: RealSelf, a popular online platform for cosmetic treatments and doctor connections, has unveiled the 2025 Wedding Glow-Up Real Talk Report. This report, based on data from numerous consumer searches, patient reviews, and input from 20 top plastic surgeons and dermatologists in the U.S., showcases the latest trends in aesthetic treatments for brides. The insights were gathered from millions of searches on RealSelf and feedback from industry experts, providing a detailed analysis of the most sought-after cosmetic procedures.
news.headline: RealSelf's 2025 Wedding Glow-Up Real Talk Report reveals top aesthetic treatment trends for brides, based on data from millions of consumer searches and insights from 20 leading doctors across the U.S.

news.summary: An exclusive cannabis encounter offering an authentic, plant-based taste.
news.headline: FLUENT introduces MOODS Black with authentic flavor, enhancing cannabis experience in Florida.

news.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), headquartered in Nashville, TN, recently announced a Tax Day Launch Event in southern Kentucky at the Spillway Bar & Grill on River Street in Bowling Green. The event, in partnership with Clark Distributing Company, featured American Rebel Beer and showcased the company's range of safes, personal security, self-defense products, and apparel. CEO Andy Ross joined D93 WDNS Classic Rock Radio in Bowling Green to promote the launch party. The event aimed to introduce the brand to the Kentucky market and attract new customers.
news.headline: American Rebel Beer to launch event in Bowling Green, Kentucky with Clark Distributing Company. CEO Andy Ross celebrates on D93 WDNS Classic Rock Radio.

news.summary: New York-based company AIRCO™, focused on carbon conversion technology for sustainable energy solutions, has recently conducted a series of significant demonstrations in collaboration with the Department of Defense. These demonstrations, using the company's exclusive AIRMADE® Fuel, encompassed various applications on land, in the air, and at sea. By partnering with the Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) and the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD), AIRCO™ has accomplished groundbreaking milestones in advancing its technology offerings across different military branches.
news.headline: AIRCO™ and US Department of Defense complete demonstrations using CO₂-Derived Drop-In Fuel across land, air, and sea.

news.summary: The US Remote Patient Monitoring Market was valued at $14.15 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $29.13 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 12.8%. The growth is primarily driven by the increasing number of elderly individuals in the US, expected to rise from 58 million in 2022 to 82 million by 2050. Companies like Boston Scientific Corporation, Abbott, and Dexcom are enhancing remote patient monitoring through digital biomarkers and AI-driven analytics. Government initiatives, including Medicare reimbursement for RPM services and the CMS Hospital-at-Home program, are also boosting adoption. The market is segmented into devices, software, and services, with the device segment holding the largest share in 2023. Innovative products like Dexcom's Stelo, a glucose biosensor, connected to smartphones for continuous monitoring, are contributing to market growth. The American Hospital Association supports remote care delivery across state lines, further fueling advancements in remote patient monitoring.
news.headline: US Remote Patient Monitoring Market to reach $29.13 billion by 2030, growing at 12.8% CAGR. Key drivers include aging population and demand for cost-effective healthcare solutions. Share of seniors in total population projected to rise from 17% to 23%. Device segment estimated to hold largest share in 2023. Dexcom's glucose biosensor received FDA clearance in March 2024. Government initiatives like Medicare reimbursement accelerate adoption.

news.summary: In a bid to offer more options to global enterprise and mid-market companies, Mesh, a comprehensive T&E platform, revealed a substantial enhancement in its travel booking services on April 15, 2025, in New York. This strategic alliance aims to provide increased flexibility and choices to businesses.
news.headline: Mesh integrates Sabre NDC to enhance business travel experience for companies; issued on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Nucor (NYSE: NUE) will hold a live conference call in conjunction with the release of its first quarter earnings. The call will be hosted by Leon Topalian, Chair, President, and CEO of Nucor. Investors and interested individuals are welcome to tune in to hear insights and updates on the company's performance.
news.headline: Join Nucor's first quarter 2025 conference call with CEO Leon Topalian. Stay tuned for earnings release details.

The first quarter of 2025 revealed significant progress for the company, with the introduction of innovative product features, expansion into new markets globally, as well as receiving notable accolades within the industry and making a positive impact in the community.
news.headline: Prophix® aims for significant growth in 2025 with new products and global expansion, starting strong in Q1.

news.summary: Luxurious and uniquely designed living spaces are now available in downtown Washington, as Placemakr, a leading flexible-use hospitality and multifamily operator, has unveiled its inaugural property in Salt Lake City, Utah. The new venture is a collaboration between Placemakr and High, offering a fresh approach to upscale urban living. This development marks a significant milestone for Placemakr as it expands its portfolio, promising a mix of upscale amenities and versatile living arrangements in a prime city location.

news.summary: Celebrating a decade of achievements, Cockroach Labs advances its progress with a significant executive hire. New York-based Cockroach Labs, a trailblazer in cloud-native distributed SQL databases featuring CockroachDB, revealed the selection of Sailesh Munagala on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in New York, SmarterDx was named one of the leading innovators of 2025 by Modern Healthcare. SmarterDx is recognized for its expertise in clinical AI focusing on revenue integrity and care quality. This acknowledgment is part of Modern Healthcare's program that honors exceptional individuals and entities at the forefront of advancements in the healthcare industry.

news.summary: A collaboration between SandboxAQ and NVIDIA has introduced a new class of enterprise AI called Large Quantitative Models (LQMs), designed to revolutionize problem-solving. This innovation promises to speed up discovery processes by an impressive 4 times. This partnership aims to leverage the power of LQMs to tackle the world's toughest challenges effectively. The announcement was made in Palo Alto, California, on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: SandboxAQ partners with NVIDIA to enhance discovery speed by 4x with Large Quantitative Models, revolutionizing problem-solving.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in New York, a leading couples' pleasure products company, We-Vibe, conducted a survey of 429 Americans engaged in long-term relationships lasting five years or more. The survey aimed to investigate how modern couples sustain sexual satisfaction in their relationships. The results demonstrated that minor adjustments, such as open communication and trying new activities, play a significant role in maintaining intimacy among couples.
news.headline: We-Vibe reports findings from survey of 429 Americans in relationships lasting 5+ years, highlighting key to sexual satisfaction in LTRs.

news.summary: A renowned expert in the field, Yair has been appointed to AU10TIX, a top player in identity verification and management. This move comes on April 15, 2025, as the company continues to lead in providing these services globally. AU10TIX operates from TEL AVIV, Israel, and NEW YORK.

news.summary: Christy Winter has recently joined Cantata to lead product strategy in clinical practice and technology solutions for the health and human services market. With extensive experience in technology and behavioral health, Winter's expertise will play a crucial role in enhancing Cantata's offerings. This development comes as Cantata Health expands its presence in the industry. The company is headquartered in Lakeway, Texas, and the announcement was made on April 15, 2025.

Specifically, this development was announced on April 15, 2025. dtSearch, a prominent enterprise and developer text search provider, is at the forefront of this initiative, which involves working with significant volumes of data, amounting to terabytes.
news.headline: Contegra releases new KaleidoSearch™ Application embedding dtSearch engine, targeting Fortune 500 clients.

news.summary: One out of the 24 prospective participants in the Cohort Expansion Phase (Phase II) of the SECuRE trial has been administered with the initial dose of 8 gigabecquerels (GBq) of 67Cu-SAR-bisPSMA. This development comes after the Safety Review Committee (SRC) recently endorsed the procedure following the satisfactory conclusion of...
news.headline: First patient treated with 8 GBq of 67Cu-SAR-bisPSMA in Phase II of SECuRE trial, with 24 planned participants.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, virtual veterinary care provider Dutch has released its first State of Online Veterinary Care Report. The report reveals that 129 million Americans, accounting for one-third of the population, reside in areas lacking access to vet care. This information arrives during a challenging period for pet care, as the number of veterinarians available is dwindling across the U.S. Furthermore, this scarcity is exacerbated by high burnout rates among veterinarians, causing a crisis in the industry.
news.headline: Dutch report: 129 million Americans in vet care deserts, one-third of country lacking access to veterinarians. Burnout adds to crisis.

news.summary: PsiQuantum has secured a $10.8 million contract with the Air Force Research Laboratory in Rome, New York. This collaboration, which initiated in 2022, aims to provide AFRL with a design space for comparative quantum circuits on PsiQuantum’s circuit tapeout. This initiative is part of the ongoing Omega quantum chipset manufacturing with GlobalFoundries. As AFRL’s hardware design partner, PsiQuantum will supply its high-performance Barium Titanate (BTO) Electro-Optic phase shifter technology.
news.headline: PsiQuantum secures $10.8M contract with Air Force Research Lab in NY to provide advanced quantum chip capabilities.

news.summary: Tetra Tech, Inc., a prominent consulting and engineering services provider, has recently secured a significant contract worth $8 million from the City of Gloucester, Massachusetts. The contract is for the provision of engineering design and technical services as part of a substantial wastewater treatment modernization program. Tetra Tech's team of engineers and technical specialists will be responsible for designing advanced solutions for wastewater treatment.
news.headline: Tetra Tech receives $8M contract for wastewater treatment program in Massachusetts. #TTEK #engineering #environment

news.summary: In New York, Aanika is rapidly approaching a significant achievement as they are expected to surpass $50 million in risk exposure by the end of the month. This milestone marks a pivotal moment for the company as they shift from research and development to complete commercial operations. Analysts predict that this figure will likely reach over $100 million in the next year, primarily driven by the increasing interest from top cooperatives and agribusinesses across the country. The expansion of Aanika's services highlights their emerging position as an innovative agricultural insurance firm that combines biotechnology, data analytics, and financial protection.
news.headline: Aanika's science-led insurance model launches with $50M in Q2 risk transfer, reshaping agricultural risk. Expanding to double in next 12 months.

news.summary: Magnolia Advanced Materials will be showcasing their products at SAMPE Booth L8 on May 20 and May 21, 2025, at the Indiana Convention Center in Atlanta.
news.headline: Magnolia Advanced Materials to exhibit at SAMPE 2025 in Indianapolis on May 20-21 at Booth L8.

news.summary: The Risk Posture Command Center in the AvePoint Confidence Platform offers real-time insight into data security and risk posture. It presents actionable suggestions to reduce risk and ensure compliance.
news.headline: AvePoint launches Risk Posture Command Center in Confidence Platform for global orgs to manage data security.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Robin Energy Ltd. (NASDAQ: RBNE) headquartered in Limassol, Cyprus, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report encompasses the combined carve-out financial statements for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. Robin Energy Ltd. operates as an international provider of energy transportation services through its fleet of ships worldwide.
news.headline: Robin Energy Ltd. released its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with financial statements for fiscal year ending December 31.

news.summary: Fayetteville, Arkansas - White River Bancshares Company (OTCQX: WRIV), the parent company of Signature Bank of Arkansas, announced a significant increase in net income for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported a net income of $2.63 million, which translates to $1.07 per diluted share, marking a substantial rise from $509,000, or $0.26 per diluted share, in the same period in 2024. In the previous quarter, the company had a net income of $1.83 million, or $0.75 per diluted share. It is important to note that all financial figures are unaudited, and the per share data has been adjusted to account for the two-for-one stock split that occurred on September 4, 2024.
news.headline: White River Bancshares Co. sees net income rise to $2.63M in Q1 2025, up from $509K in Q1 2024 - $1.07 per diluted share.

news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus on April 15, 2025, Toro Corp. (NASDAQ: TORO) disclosed its financial performance for the periods ending December 31, 2024. Toro, a global energy transportation firm, revealed its earnings for the quarter and the entire year.
news.headline: Toro Corp. reports net income: $1.0M for three months and $25.2M for year ended Dec. 31, 2024. Handysize Tanker Business spin-off completed on April 14, 2025.

news.summary: The first AI Brand Reputation Index by LiveWorld has been launched, offering unique insights into how AI influences the perceptions of 50 pharmaceutical brands. This index delves into the impact that AI has on these brands' reputations, providing valuable information for industry professionals and stakeholders.
news.headline: LiveWorld launches AI Brand Reputation Index for 50 top pharmaceutical brands, revealing AI's impact on perceptions.

news.summary: NeurAxis, a medical technology company focusing on neuromodulation therapies, will be presenting at the Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 in partnership with MicroCapClub on Wednesday, April 23, 2025 at 11:00 AM EST. Brian Carico, NeurAxis CEO, will lead the presentation. NeurAxis is listed on NYSE American as NRXS, and specializes in addressing chronic conditions in both children and adults. The showcase is a platform for discussing their innovative solutions.
news.headline: NeurAxis to present at Planet MicroCap Showcase in Vegas on April 23, 2025 with CEO Brian Carico, addressing neuromodulation therapies.

news.summary: In a multi-year deal with SEGA of America, Disguise has acquired new rights to the core intellectual property of Sonic the Hedgehog™. This agreement will allow Disguise to use the iconic character's IP for upcoming products and merchandise.
news.headline: Disguise obtains new rights for Sonic the Hedgehog™ from SEGA of America in a multi-year deal.

news.summary: Broadcom has introduced a new security capability known as Incident Prediction, making it the first in the industry to do so. This feature uses artificial intelligence to detect and prevent living-off-the-land (LOTL) attacks, which have been increasingly concerning for cybersecurity. LOTL attacks involve hackers using legitimate software tools to carry out malicious activities, making them more difficult to detect. By leveraging AI, Incident Prediction can identify and disrupt these attacks effectively, enhancing security measures for users.
news.headline: Broadcom introduces Incident Prediction to halt living-off-the-land attacks using AI in security measures.

news.summary: Carthage, Missouri - Leggett & Platt (NYSE: LEG), a renowned manufacturer of engineered products across various markets, is scheduled to announce its first quarter earnings on April 28, 2025, once the market closes. An exclusive conference call is set to take place on April 29, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (7:30 a.m. Central Time). During this call, they will discuss the Q1 results, annual guidance, market conditions, company strategies, and other pertinent topics.
news.headline: Leggett & Platt to announce 1Q 2025 results on April 28 after market close; conference call on April 29.

news.summary: According to Matt Hougan, the Chief Investment Officer at Bitwise Asset Management, Bitcoin is showing signs of readiness to increase in value if larger economic challenges ease. Despite recent market volatility, Bitcoin has remained stable, with its value holding steady at $84,379 compared to $84,317 a month ago, resulting in a negligible 0.07% return over 30 days. This consistency is noteworthy given significant global events like the creation of a Bitcoin strategic reserve by the U.S. and the implementation of global tariffs by former President Donald Trump. Hougan believes that Bitcoin is poised for growth once external obstacles diminish. He expressed frustration with the market's lack of movement, highlighting Bitcoin's potential for upward mobility.
news.headline: Bitcoin showing stability at $84,379, only 0.07% change in a month. Bitwise's Matt Hougan sees potential for growth if macro obstacles clear.

news.summary: In an announcement made in New York, Click Therapeutics revealed that CT-132 has received FDA approval for marketing in the United States. This marks a significant milestone as CT-132 becomes the first Prescription Digital Therapeutic (PDT) sanctioned for the preventive treatment of episodic migraines in the country.
news.headline: FDA authorizes marketing of CT-132 by Click Therapeutics, the first Prescription Digital Therapeutic for Preventive Episodic Migraine in US.

news.summary: A new Chief Operating Officer, George Herat, has recently joined Tracker, a global recruiting technology company based in Knoxville, Tennessee. This addition to the executive team aims to enhance the company's operations and growth strategies.
news.headline: George Herat appointed as COO of recruitment tech company Tracker in Knoxville, Tenn. #AI #TechLeadership

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Hexagon Purus, a global leader in zero emission mobility solutions, announced their receipt of the first purchase order from MCV, a prominent bus manufacturer in the Middle East and Africa region. This significant deal, valued at around EUR 2.4 million, is for the supply of next-generation hydrogen fuel storage systems. The delivery of Hexagon Purus’ cutting-edge systems is scheduled for 2025 and will be integrated into MCV’s hydrogen fuel-cell electric buses designed for the European public transportation sector.
news.headline: Hexagon Purus gets 1st order from MCV, worth EUR 2.4 million, for hydrogen fuel storage systems for buses in 2025.

news.summary: AUSTIN, TX - On April 15, 2025, Scout Ventures revealed the addition of Zach Beecher as a Partner, showcasing his broad experience in spearheading mission-focused projects in sectors like early-stage tech and national initiatives. With this new hire, Scout Ventures aims to leverage Beecher's expertise to continue their growth and impact in the industry.
news.headline: Zach Beecher appointed Partner at Scout Ventures, bringing vast experience in mission-driven initiatives.

news.summary: In 2024, national home prices increased by 5.8%. A group of over 100 housing experts predict that in 2025, home prices will rise by an average of 3.4%, followed by a 3.3% growth in 2026. This information comes from the Q1 2025 Fannie Mae Home Price Expectations Survey.
news.headline: Experts predict home price growth to slow down, dropping from 5.8% in 2024 to 3.4% in 2025 and 3.3% in 2026.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Converge Technology Solutions Corp. unveiled the Data & AI Design Studio initiative in Toronto and Gatineau, QC. This program aims to assist businesses in all AI stages. Converge (TSX: CTS) is the company behind this initiative.
news.headline: Converge Technology Solutions launches Data & AI Design Studio to accelerate AI adoption. TSX: CTS.

news.summary: CARTI, a renowned Arkansas-based non-profit organization, has adopted DeepScribe's specialized AI for oncology to document and provide information to patients. This AI, designed for oncology care, is provided by DeepScribe, a top player in the industry. The decision was made public on April 15, 2025, in San Francisco. CARTI, being one of the leading organizations in the nation, will benefit from the insights provided by this technology, showcasing their commitment to enhancing patient care.
news.headline: CARTI Cancer Center partners with DeepScribe AI for oncology; utilizes ambient system for patient insights.

news.summary: Today, in Udaipur, India, the 226-room hotel, Udaipur Marriott, is set to offer exceptional hospitality. Marriott Hotels, a part of Marriott Bonvoy's collection of 30+ hotel brands, revealed this exciting news on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Marriott debuts in Udaipur with a 226-room hotel blending charm, heritage, and elegance - April 15, 2025.

news.summary: A well-known fitness brand, Crunch Holdings, LLC, has recently welcomed a new investment partner, Leonard Green & Partners, to drive its growth. The brand, Crunch Fitness, renowned worldwide in the fitness sector, revealed this strategic move on April 15, 2025. This investment aims to fuel the expansion and development of Crunch Fitness further, propelling it to new heights. Leonard Green & Partners' involvement signifies a significant milestone for Crunch Fitness as it charts its path for accelerated growth in the competitive fitness industry.
news.headline: Crunch Fitness receives strategic investment from Leonard Green & Partners to fuel growth. NYC, Apr 15, 2025 - PRNewswire.
